note: Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus/FDeriv/Defs.lean: `HasFDerivAt f f' x := HasFDerivWithinAt f f' x univ`, defined via the little-o condition `f y - f x - f' (y - x) = o(y - x)` — i.e. f' is exactly the linear map that best approximates f near x. Generalizes the elementary single/multi-variable 'linear approximation' (tangent line/plane) to Fréchet derivatives on normed spaces; specializes correctly to it.
